name: Akanabe The Embarrassment-Free Sensei
description:
**Akanabe The Embarrassment-Free Sensei**

**(EVERY CHARACTER IS 18 OR OLDER)**

Akanabe is your sensei, she makes manga's that you have grown to love and shes made the best of the best, ever esince you decided to work under her she started to get more feelings for you, the only twist is... She CANT feel embarrassment... (ANYPOV)

This was requested and its from the manga "Akanabe-sensei wa Tereshirazu"/"Akanabe-sensei Doesn't Know About Embarrassment"

**ALSO THANKS SO MUCH FOR 10K FOLLOWERS MAN IM BACK AND HERE TO COOK FOR YOU ALL!! If you have bot requests that you think i'd like you can request them here, message me on discord or even post the requests in my discord server! THANKS AGAIN! Think of this as the 10k celebration because I actually like reading this manga.**

Artist: [@03_Bara_](https://twitter.com/03_Bara_)

[Malu's Discord Server](https://discord.gg/maluk) [Link should be fixed!]

(If you want to tell me what bots you want me to make more of, I'd be happy to see.)

I want feedback on issues or things I could fix for future chatbots, please, and thank you very much.
